content.en:
The Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who took out the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who took out the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side was the Lord of the Cold Star, and his strength was very top among the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"Everyone, the value of the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side, you should all know that even if it is used by the Heavenly Ancestor who has reached the Ninety Percent Three Realm of the Origin Rules on the Other Side, there is a chance to break through to the Ninety Percent Four Realm of the Origin Rules of the Other Shore. Moreover, the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side also has the effect of refining the flesh, which will make the strength of the flesh skyrocket. "

The Lord of the Cold Stars introduced.

At this time, some Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors were interested.

There are many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and the Origin Rules on the other side have not yet reached the ninety percent and four realms, and the value of the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the other side is also extremely huge for them!

Then.

The Lord of the Cold Star said again: "All Heavenly Ancestors can make their own offers, and if there is a treasure that you are interested in, I will trade it." If it's a worthless treasure, no matter how much I sell, I won't trade it. Of course, I also have the treasures I need, such as the cold gold on the other side, if I can take out 1,000 yuan, I will trade it directly. "

"The other side of the cold gold, this thing is too rare, who has 1,000 yuan ???"

A Origin Ascending Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

A Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor shook his head, he couldn't take out 1,000 pieces of Cold Gold from the other side, not even a piece, and he didn't have a chance to find other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to make up for it.

At this time.

The Lord of Ice and Rain is also here.

After Ye Tian saw the Lord of Ice and Rain, he summoned and asked, "Lord of Ice and Rain, what kind of treasure is the cold gold on the other side, and what is the use of this Lord of Cold Stars?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain introduced, "The cold metal on the other side is a very precious and rare material, which is of little use to other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, but it is very important to the Lord of Cold Stars. According to the information I know, the Lord of the Cold Star should be cultivating a Origin Ancestor on the other side, and there is a lack of some materials, and the cold gold on the other side is one of them. He had been collecting the cold gold from the other side, but he still lacked this material. That's why he's trading the cold gold here. "

"The Origin Ancestor on the other side, what is this?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said: "The Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore is the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, after the Origin of the Other Shore reaches a certain level, there is no way to continue to improve, so it is necessary to combine the Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore with the physical body to cultivate a special Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore. This kind of Origin Ancestor on the other side is above the golden body on the other side, which will make the physical body extremely terrifying. If a top-notch Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor encounters a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who condenses the Origin Ancestor on the other side, don't even want to break the opponent's physical body with all his strength, the difference in strength will be very large!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, do you know where there is cold gold on the other side?" Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know!" the Lord of Ice and Rain shook his head, "I don't need the cold gold on the other side, so naturally I don't know where the cold gold on the other side is." Even if you know, it will definitely not be easy to obtain, otherwise the Lord of the Cold Star will go and seize the cold gold on the other side. "

The Lord of Ice and Rain didn't know where there was cold gold on the other side, but Ye Tian didn't give up.

He kept inquiring in Xuanyin Giant City, and even spent the source stone on the other side to buy information, and really heard a news.

Origin: A forbidden area in the Black River, the Jackdaw Abyss, there is the cold gold on the other side.

The Jackdaw Abyss is not as famous as the Innocent Abyss, because although the Innocent Abyss is dangerous, some areas are not so dangerous, and even contain opportunities.

Many of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on the Origin Black River did not know how many resources they had obtained from the Innocent Abyss, which could simply be described as countless.

For those powerful Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, the Innocent Abyss was their treasure land.

The Jackdaw Abyss is different, this is just a small place, a forbidden area, the place is not big, but there is a terrible creature living - the Extreme Ice Crow.

There are a lot of Extreme Cold Ice Crows, and there are three Extreme Cold Ice Crows at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level in the Jackdaw Yuan, even the Lord of the Cold Star doesn't dare to go in to find death!

Unless the Lord of the Cold Star has cultivated the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side and his strength has skyrocketed, he will dare to go in and wander around, but he can only deal with one Extreme Cold Ice Crow at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level, and still can't compete with three Extreme Cold Ice Crows at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level.

The strength of the Origin Upper Realm can be roughly divided into weak, ordinary, strong, top-notch, and overlord.

A weak Origin Upper Realm is very rare, it is the kind of Origin Upper Realm that is promoted by ordinary origin rules and ordinary origins, and it is not a genius of the other side.

Most of the limits of this Origin Realm are the Origin Middle Realm, and it is too difficult to become the Origin Upper Realm.

But there is still hope for them, once they break through, it will be a weak Origin Upper Realm, and their strength is comparable to the invincible powerhouse of the Origin Middle Realm.

And the Origin Upper Realm Overlord is the level of the Innocent Demon Vine, and after the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor condenses the Origin Ancestor on the other side, he will also step into the level of the Overlord.

Even in the middle of the land of the Eternal Shore, the powerhouses of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level are extremely rare, and no force dares to venture into the Jackdaw Abyss and fight desperately with those Extreme Cold Ice Crows, just to find the cold gold on the other side that is useless to them.

Because of this, the Lord of the Cold Stars has not yet gathered the cold gold on the other side.

"I really hope to get together the cold gold on the other side!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

Origin Black River.

The area near the western part of the Eternal Lands is far away from Windtooth Island.

Jackdaw Abyss is in this area.

Ye Tian spent some time shuttling here, just to enter the Jackdaw Abyss.

Soon, he found Jackdaw Abyss.

Not long after entering the Jackdaw Abyss, he was killed by an Extreme Ice Crow from the Origin Upper Realm.

Still, he sensed the other Arctic Ice Ravens.

Afterwards.

He copied an Extreme Cold Ice Crow at the peak of the Origin Middle Realm, and let this Extreme Cold Ice Crow copy the body and dive into the depths of the Jackdaw Abyss, looking for the cold gold on the other side.

Sure enough.

He entered as an Arctic Ice Raven and was not attacked.

Deep in the Jackdaw Abyss.

He sneaked in here and sensed three extremely terrifying breaths, these three extremely cold ice crows did not hide their breath at all, they could all sense their terrifying breath, and no one dared to approach and disturb them.

"Let's look for the cold gold on the other side here!"

Ye Tian slowly searched.

After a while, he finally found the other side of the cold gold.

"This is the cold gold on the other side!" Ye Tian looked at the white metal in his hand, exuding a cold aura, and it was very tough.

Afterwards.

He slowly searched for the cold gold on the other side.

Since the cold gold on the other side of this place has not been taken away by other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, there are quite a few of them.

After a period of time, he can be regarded as having collected a thousand pieces of cold gold from the other side.
